name: Event Aggregator
responsibility: Collects agent events from Agent Watcher, buffers them silently during deep work, and generates sorted briefings on demand. Also manages the review audit log (silent timing and outcome recording). Never initiates notifications or interrupts the user.

interfaces.name: push_event
interfaces.api_detail: Called by Agent Watcher (via event subscription) when agent status changes. Persists the event to Data Store with briefing_id=null (unread).

interfaces.name: generate_briefing
interfaces.api_detail: Collects all unread events (briefing_id=null), groups by task, sorts by task dependency (upstream tasks first), elevates drift-flagged tasks to top. Creates and persists a Briefing entity, marks consumed events.

interfaces.name: mark_briefing_read
interfaces.api_detail: Sets read_at timestamp on the briefing.

interfaces.name: get_unread_event_count
interfaces.api_detail: Returns count of events with briefing_id=null. Used by App Shell for briefing badge indicator (unread events count). Distinct from unreviewed branch count.

interfaces.name: get_unreviewed_branch_count
interfaces.api_detail: Returns count of agent branches with status='completed' that have no ReviewLog with outcome='approved'. This is the correct semantic for the menubar icon numeric badge per REQ-009-AC-3. Query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_branches ab WHERE ab.status='completed' AND ab.id NOT IN (SELECT branch_id FROM review_logs WHERE outcome='approved').

interfaces.name: start_review_timer
interfaces.api_detail: Starts a silent timer when user opens a card/graph view for a specific branch. Timer ID is returned for later end_review call.

interfaces.name: end_review
interfaces.api_detail: Stops the timer, calculates duration, persists ReviewLog. If timer_id is unknown (e.g., app crashed), logs a warning and creates a ReviewLog with duration=0.

interfaces.name: briefing.ready
interfaces.api_detail: Emitted after generate_briefing completes. Frontend can listen to update the briefing panel if it's open.

data_models.name: BriefingSortAlgorithm

fields.name: priority_rules
fields.constraints: 1. Drift-flagged tasks first. 2. Tasks that are upstream dependencies of other tasks. 3. Completed tasks before running tasks. 4. Chronological order as tiebreaker.

data_models.note: Task dependency info comes from TaskDependency table (manual). If no dependencies defined, falls back to chronological.

data_models.name: ActiveReviewTimer
data_models.note: In-memory only (not persisted). Lost on app crash, which is acceptable — the ReviewLog will just have duration=0.

nfr_constraints.performance: Briefing generation < 200ms for up to 100 unread events. Event push < 10ms.
nfr_constraints.other: Review timers are in-memory (HashMap<timer_id, ActiveReviewTimer>). Crash-tolerant: if timer is lost, ReviewLog is still created with duration=0 and a warning flag.
